title: Mandatory columns if something changes in status
excerpt: When users change the status to “Done” I want them to have to fill effort spent (a numbers column on the board) Is this possible?

posts.author: PaolaM (PM)
posts.cookedHtml: When users change the status to “Done” I want them to have to fill effort spent (a numbers column on the board) Is this possible?

posts.author: Marius.Manic (Marius)
posts.cookedHtml:
You could use a Button column which changes Status (restricted from edit) only when Effort is introduced:
When Button clicked and only if Effort is greater than 0 Then set Status to Done

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@PaolaM

Column Magic has a required columns function that does what you are looking for. Here is one recipe:
